title: charter bundle validate --json + companion charter generate tracking instruction
description: Locks behavior for FR-002. Two related shapes: (1) the `charter bundle validate --json` envelope; (2) the optional tracking instruction that `charter generate --json` must emit when generated output is not yet tracked, so the E2E can follow it without out-of-band knowledge. WP01 research determines whether option (2) is needed; if `bundle validate` is changed to accept the generated path directly instead, the tracking-instruction shape is unused.

generate_tracking_instruction.description: Optional field on `charter generate --json` output. Present when generated charter requires tracking before `bundle validate` will accept it. The E2E reads this and follows it verbatim.

paths.description: Project-relative paths to stage when action == git_add.

reason.description: Operator-facing rationale, e.g. `bundle validate requires charter.md to be tracked`.
